title: Pearlized White Ceramic Oil Burner | Heart Shaped Tea Light Wax Melt Burner | Elegant Wax Melt & Essential Oil Warmer - 11cm
features: ROMANTIC HEART DESIGN | This beautiful ceramic burner, shaped like a heart, adds a warm and loving touch to any space. Perfect for creating a cosy atmosphere in your home
PEARLISED GLAZE FINISH | The stunning pearlized coating gives this ceramic burner a subtle shimmer, adding a touch of elegance and sophistication to any space
SOFT AMBIENT GLOW | When lit, the burner casts a gentle, flickering glow, creating a soothing ambience. A lovely addition to any room, from the living area to the bedroom or bathroom
PERFECT GIFT IDEA | Packaged in a charming individual box, this wax melt burner makes a thoughtful gift for birthdays, anniversaries, or housewarmings. A great way to show you care
WAX MELT BURNER | Measuring 11 cm high and 11 cm across, this ceramic burner is stylish yet compact, making it a tasteful and practical decor piece for any home
